Test for DIF with explicit response data (deprecated)

Source: R/dif.R
dif_test_with_data.Rd

Deprecated single-factor wrapper kept for backward compatibility; use dif_test, which supports multiple DIF variables, interactions, and iterative purification.

Usage

dif_test_with_data(
  response_matrix,
  group,
  model = c("Rasch", "2PL", "3PL", "GRM", "PCM", "GPCM"),
  items = NULL,
  type = c("both", "uniform", "nonuniform"),
  method = NULL,
  alpha = 0.05
)

Arguments

response_matrix

Matrix of item responses (persons x items)

group

Grouping vector

model

Matching model

items

Items to test (default: all)

type

Type of DIF

method

Ignored (kept for compatibility)

alpha

Significance level

Value

Object of class dif_analysis
